title: User Manifest
description: Identity and config manifest for a Claude Foundations install. Instance file: user-manifest.json. 10 required top-level sections (identity/paths/tools/vault/projects/people/behavioral/backlog/architect/system) per SP01 v1.0.0 reviewer-coherence; 1.1.0 adds 3 optional sections (hooks/schema/plans) + vault.root_directories[] for SP02 hook-config externalization (Lead 2 §2); 1.2.0 adds 3 optional sections (dashboard/brief_repos/crons) + vault.context_documents[] for SP06 generic-processing-skills consumption (per SP09 T-9 fold-in, AR-3); 1.3.0 adds system.backup_targets[] + vault.tag_audit_exemptions[] for SP04 T-3 capability wiring (per Plan 71 S30 recipe-vs-schema drift triage; replaces aspirational `foundation.backup_targets` + `domain.engagement_aliases` paths in original SP04 spec — engagement_aliases already lives at vault.engagement_aliases since 1.0.0); 1.4.0 widens architect.prior_seed from string|null to string[] (breaking) + adds default benchmarks (orphan_pct_max=5, avg_links_min=3, frontmatter_consistency_min=95) for SP05 T-2 generic-architect contract (per Plan 71 SP05 spec L57 recipe; closes longstanding architect.prior_seed schema-vs-AC drift carry-forward S32+); 1.5.0 adds system.completion_state object keyed by section_id ({A..E} → {committed_at, transcript_sha?}) for SP07 T-10 per-section checkpoint + SessionStart resume contract; 1.5.x adds vault.architecture_doc (string|null, optional, additive — no const bump) closing the librarian-SKILL.md-vs-schema drift surfaced in audit-2026-05-02 Gap #4 (per Plan 71 SP10 T-6); 1.5.x also adds vault.tag_prefix_archetype (string|null, optional, additive — no const bump) for SP12 T-14/T-7 surface-#4 auto-author input — captures user's declared workflow archetype to drive _tag_prefixes selection (consultant/researcher/developer/educator/manager/custom).

paths.description: Filesystem pointers. paths.vault_root is the canonical field; vault.root is a mirror.

root_directories.description: Allowlist of top-level directory names within vault.root. Empty array means no allowlist (any folder permitted). Read by pre-write-guard.sh R-04 enforcement (1.1.0+).

context_documents.description: Vault-relative paths read as context by backlog-research and similar skills (1.2.0+, optional). Default ['CLAUDE.md'] for new users; per SP06 audit F-08 remediation.

tag_audit_exemptions.description: File paths or glob patterns exempt from tag-coverage audit. Empty array means no exemptions (all files audited). 1.3.0+, per SP04 T-3 tag-coverage-audit wiring.

architecture_doc.description: Vault-relative path or name of the vault's architecture/conventions doc (e.g. 'Vault Architecture.md'). Consumed by librarian SKILL.md L53 as the structural source-of-truth for the vault's own conventions. Null when the user has no such doc. 1.5.x additive (no const bump), per Plan 71 SP10 T-6.

tag_prefix_archetype.description: User's declared workflow archetype that drives _tag_prefixes selection at surface-#4 auto-author time. Free-form string; well-known values consultant/researcher/developer/educator/manager map to archetype-keyed prefix tables; any other value triggers the LLM-compose path in surface-4-tag-prefixes.sh. Null when the user has not declared (defaults to LLM-compose). 1.5.x additive (no const bump), per Plan 71 SP12 T-14 (Q-ID A-CB-7).

projects_root_dirname.description: Top-level directory name where the user organizes structured projects (default 'Engagements'; user-declared alternatives like 'Clients', 'Projects', 'Workstreams' are common). Read by frontmatter-enforce.sh detect_type() via FM_PROJECTS_ROOT_DIRNAME env-var to parameterize the projects-root path patterns; closes A3-Gap #1. Null when user has not declared (consumer falls back to 'Engagements'). 1.5.x additive (no const bump), per Plan 71 SP12 T-9.

required_fields_overrides.description: Per-canonical-file-type required-frontmatter-fields override map. Keys = canonical type (matching vault-schema.json types[].name); values = array of field names that should be required ON TOP OF (not replacing) the type's schema-declared required set. Read by frontmatter-enforce.sh; consumed at validation time. Empty object {} = no overrides. 1.5.x additive (no const bump), per Plan 71 SP12 T-9.

benchmarks.description: Generic PKM heuristic benchmarks. Defaults per SP05 spec §benchmark-tier-thresholds: orphan_pct_max=5, avg_links_min=3, frontmatter_consistency_min=95. Onboarder Q4 may override.

prior_seed.description: Free-text concerns from Onboarder Q1. 1.4.0+ widens from string|null to string[] (breaking).

research_topics.description: Industry-tuned search-prompt seeds consumed by /architect external-research mode. SP12 T-10 auto-authors these from declared identity.industry + interview architect-concerns. 1.5.x additive (no const bump), per Plan 71 SP12 T-10.

committed_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of section commit.

transcript_sha.description: shasum of the transcript file at commit time. Null/absent for deterministic sections (A, E) with no transcript.

completion_state.description: Per-section completion-checkpoint metadata keyed by section_id (A..E). Written atomically by onboarding/checkpoint.sh alongside phases_completed[] (SP07 T-10, 1.5.0+). Re-record removes the section_id entry.

backup_targets.description: Filesystem paths consumed by librarian backup capability beyond the system defaults (vault, claude-home, plans-dir). Empty array means defaults only. 1.3.0+, per SP04 T-3 backup capability wiring.

hooks.description: Hook runtime config consumed by foundation-repo/hooks/ (1.1.0+, optional). Absent fields fall back to Lead 2 §2 hardcoded defaults.

protected_session_end_hooks.description: Hook names that pre-write-guard refuses to disable in settings.json. Honors HOOK_GUARD_DISABLE_OK=<name> env override (and CLAUDE_MEM_DISABLE_OK=1 for back-compat).

audit_log_path.description: Override destination for hook-audit.log. Defaults to $HOOKS_STATE/hook-audit.log.

schema.description: Schema-related runtime config (1.1.0+, optional). Distinct from the JSON-schema files at $CLAUDE_HOME/schemas/.

size_guards.description: Per-file size enforcement entries consumed by pre-write-guard size-guard rule.

path.description: Vault-relative path of the file to monitor.

backlog_enforcement.description: Read by pre-write-guard R-15 to enforce backlog-row presence on new plan creation.

master_initiative_whitelist.description: Plan slugs exempt from the NN- prefix conformance audit emitted by librarian plan-index. Used for legacy master-initiative directories that predate the prefix convention. Empty by default — adopters typically don't have these. (1.5.x additive, SP10 T-14, replaces prior hardcoded set.)

dashboard.description: Dashboard-integration runtime config (1.2.0+, optional). Consumed by morning-brief skill. Per SP06 manifest key_design_decisions.dashboard_gating: enabled defaults false; path required when enabled=true (enforced at SP06 runtime, not schema).

brief_repos.description: Brief-Repo paths consumed by morning-brief skill loop (1.2.0+, optional). SP06 spec generalizes the brief-repo loop from a hardcoded list to this array.

crons.description: Cron-group runtime config (1.2.0+, optional). SP06 spec: cron groups move from a hardcoded list to crons.groups[]. Consumed by morning-brief.

groups.description: Named cron groups; each entry pairs a label with one or more job ids from orchestration.json.
